seed: spec §9.2 disputed fact; evidence-vs-evidence, claim as endpoint (P, E, G4)
passage: How many planets are in the Solar System? The 2006 IAU resolution defined eight planets and reclassified Pluto as a dwarf planet. Before 2006, the standard count taught for decades was nine. The IAU decision supersedes the older consensus, but the reclassification remains debated by some planetary scientists.
